approach: Complete 16-leaf physical-CNF cube pilot on the normalized order-42 degree-{20,21} q=20 branch

strategy.mechanism: Partition the audited normalized formula on four declared cross-part primary variables, independently check the complete cover and physical leaf reconstruction, and require a checked model or DRAT/LRAT proof per resolved leaf.

hypothesis: A complete four-variable cover exposes at least one normalized q=20 leaf decidable by CaDiCaL 1.7.3 within 20 seconds and 1 GiB with a checkable SAT model or UNSAT proof.
discriminating_test: First require all 16 normalized R(3,3,6) physical leaves to pass DRAT-to-LRAT conversion and LRAT checking; then run all 16 q=20 physical leaves for 20 seconds each and accept only independently checked SAT or UNSAT.
summary: The complete manifest and independent cover/reconstruction audit passed. All 16 toy leaves were proof-checked UNSAT. All 16 production leaves returned UNKNOWN after 322.789 aggregate solver-seconds; fresh drat-trim rejected all 16 partial streams. No witness or exclusion was obtained, and 43 <= R(5,5) <= 46 remains unchanged.
rationale: The experiment falsified the predeclared tractable-leaf hypothesis while producing a reusable, independently checked cube-manifest pipeline. The negative result is exact only for the declared solver, leaf CNFs, and 20-second budgets.
claims: Variables 212, 213, 234, and 235 yield an explicit complete and pairwise-disjoint 16-cube cover of the frozen normalized q=20 formula.
The P5 edge pattern has 10 reversal-orbit classes among its 16 assignments; all 16 raw cubes were retained and no symmetry quotient was used.
All 16 normalized R(3,3,6) cube leaves have checked DRAT and LRAT certificates.
All 16 q=20 leaves returned UNKNOWN at 20 seconds, and none of their retained streams is a valid DRAT certificate.
evidence: Independent manifest audits both have SHA-256 3c72ddc8e307fea078243ba72df74cd321ee930acd6d77020a81d03c4e136eff
next_steps: Park this exact cube configuration; do not repeat it or launch q=17--19 from these UNKNOWN results.
Run the existing adjacency-row pair-distance LP lead as a materially different, exact structural discriminator.
Return to q=20 only with a materially different proof-logging solver or encoding, justified branching evidence, or a demonstrated packet defect.
experiments: .proof-experiments/20260721-101546-136ce5: 377.962 seconds total, 484,396 KiB peak child RSS, 16 toy leaves verified and 16 production leaves UNKNOWN.
.proof-experiments/20260721-102428-af542e: 155.831 seconds total, 411,008 KiB peak child RSS, all toy certificates replayed and all production partial proofs rejected.
independent_checker: checkers/cube_manifest_a.py imports neither the producer nor the Ramsey generator; it reconstructs the full edge map, path variables, 16 assignments, unit suffixes, leaf hashes, pairwise disjointness, exhaustiveness, orbit ledger, and nine adversarial mutations. The cold audit freshly compiles drat-trim/lrat-check, rebuilds every production leaf, replays all toy certificates, and rejects all production partial streams.
transfer_insights: Certificate-carrying cube-and-conquer -> a tiny explicit cover should expose tractable leaf heterogeneity -> the pipeline validated, but all 16 production leaves remained UNKNOWN under the declared budget.

established_facts.claim: The declared four-variable manifest exactly covers all assignments and reconstructs 16 physical q=20 leaf CNFs at locked hashes.
established_facts.evidence: Production manifest plus identical primary and cold audit hashes.

established_facts.claim: All 16 normalized R(3,3,6) leaf proofs pass DRAT-to-LRAT conversion and LRAT checking.
All 16 production leaves returned UNKNOWN and all 16 partial proof streams fail fresh DRAT verification.

ruled_out.claim_or_route: Repeat the same four-variable q=20 cube pilot with CaDiCaL 1.7.3 and 20 seconds per leaf.
ruled_out.scope: All 16 exact physical leaf CNFs in the retained manifest.
ruled_out.reason: Every leaf returned UNKNOWN; an identical replay has low information value.
ruled_out.reopen_condition: Use a materially different proof-logging solver or encoding, justified branching/budget evidence, or demonstrate an artifact defect.

ruled_out.claim_or_route: Treat any retained production timeout stream as an UNSAT certificate.
ruled_out.scope: All 16 partial streams, 128,241,561 aggregate uncompressed bytes.
ruled_out.reason: Fresh drat-trim rejected every stream against its cold-reconstructed leaf CNF.
ruled_out.reopen_condition: Supply a completed proof bound to the exact leaf hash and passing DRAT-to-LRAT conversion and LRAT checking.

open_leads.description: Test the exact adjacency-row pair-distance relaxation before any custom SDP.
open_leads.rationale: It is a materially different, cheap structural discriminator and already has authenticated positive controls.
open_leads.next_experiment: Extract row weight/intersection distributions from all 656 controls and compare a rational pair-moment LP against the published degree/subgraph restrictions for n=43..45.

open_leads.description: Revisit q=20 only after a solver, encoding, or branching change has an independently measured reason to alter certificate throughput.
open_leads.rationale: The monolith and all 16 short leaves are currently UNKNOWN.
open_leads.next_experiment: Benchmark a materially different proof-logging configuration first on the normalized R(3,3,6) and a declared bounded q=20 subset; retain exact certificate-throughput evidence.

blocker: No production q=20 cube resolved within the declared budget; the current data provide no principled scaling law for a larger cutoff.
reopen_condition: A materially different proof-logging solver or encoding, justified branching/budget evidence, or a demonstrated parent/cover/checker defect.
reopen_evidence: The prior checked-cover precondition was satisfied by the independently audited manifest, enabling this attempt.

continuation.objective: Run the cheapest exact adjacency-row pair-distance LP discriminator before any custom SDP or q=20 retry.
continuation.first_action: Extract exact row-weight, pair-intersection, and edge/nonedge distance distributions from all 656 authenticated controls, then encode the rational pair-moment relaxation for admissible n=43..45 profiles.
continuation.stop_condition: Park the route if it cuts no profile beyond published constraints, cuts a known control, or yields only a numerical dual that cannot be rationalized and checked exactly.

candidate_profile.scholarly_question: Can a proof-carrying cube partition make the normalized degree-{20,21} order-42 Ramsey branch tractable?
candidate_profile.meaningful_delta: Supplies a reusable independently audited physical-CNF cube manifest/checker and a negative 16-leaf cost result; it does not answer the order-42 existence question.
candidate_profile.acceptance_test: Replay both recorded experiments and reproduce the manifest hashes, 16 toy certificate checks, 16 production UNKNOWN results, and 16 cold DRAT rejections.

closest_prior_work.difference: Angeltveit and McKay use computational case checking for the upper bound; this packet concerns a separate bounded degree-band pilot and makes no bound claim.
The checker is reused as a certificate verifier; the new local artifact is the Ramsey-specific physical-leaf manifest and independent cover/reconstruction audit.

novelty_searches.source: Dynamic Survey and arXiv web search
novelty_searches.finding: DS1.18 still records 43 <= R(5,5) <= 46; no rigorous newer exact result was found.

tool_disclosure: GPT-5.6 Sol was principal investigator. Two supplied GPT-5.6 Terra delegates provided advisory literature-strategy and experiment-verification memos; Sol independently audited all relied-on claims, and no new subagent was spawned. Deterministic tools were Python 3.12.3, GCC 13.3.0, CaDiCaL 1.7.3, freshly compiled drat-trim and lrat-check, the independent C recursive-bitset graph checker, SHA-256, jq, and the computational-researcher experiment harness. Web access checked DS1.18 and arXiv. No CAS, proof assistant, external publication, or system-level modification was used.
